objective: Allow QSO-FABRIC experiments to consume immutable, capability-scoped evidence bundles from the Digital Consciousness Field.
phases: Define an immutable evidence bundle containing canonical records, field envelopes, citations, and provenance links.
Implement read-only field discovery and scoped retrieval.
Reject missing, mismatched, expired, revoked, or unauthorized evidence fail closed.
Store records and bundles by content hash with explicit version and duplicate relationships.
Expose evidence to Experimenters as observations with source references and uncertainty labels.
Link every inference and conclusion to the exact evidence bundle and experiment ledger events.
Require human review before promotion, release, or operational use.
